channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Where to Buy Affordable Last-Minute Stagecoach 2026 Tickets Online
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to the Billboard podcast. I'm your host, and today we're talking about the latest festival news. Coachella 2026 may be over, but country music fans are getting ready for Stagecoach 2026, happening from April 24th to 26th at the Empire Polo Club in Indio, California.
[Music transitions]
Host: "This year's headliners are Cody Johnson, Lainey Wilson, and Post Malone, with other notable performers like Bailey Zimmerman, Riley Green, and Brooks & Dunn. The festival features a stacked lineup, including a special HonkyTonk tent curated by Diplo, with performances by Diplo himself, Emo Nite, Marshmello, and more.
[Music transitions]
Host: "If you can't make it to the festival, don't worry. Amazon Music is the exclusive livestream destination for Stagecoach 2026, streaming on Prime Video, Twitch, and the Amazon Music app from 3 pm PDT every day. Tickets have been selling out fast since they went on sale in October, and prices can be steep. But don't worry, we've got you covered. Check out our recommendations for affordable last-minute tickets online, including StubHub, which offers a FanProtect Guarantee to protect your purchases.
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for today. Get ready for Stagecoach 2026 and catch all the action live or via livestream. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll see you next time on the Billboard podcast."
